summary: Ported project-memory server from Python to Go with interface-driven architecture following SOLID/DRY principles. Implemented 10 packages (domain, config, storage, server, inspector, git, llm, build) with segregated Reader/Writer/Searcher interfaces, pure Go SQLite via modernc.org/sqlite (no CGO), dual transport MCP server (stdio default, --http for dev), and 6-phase build pipeline.
